title: The Chilling Story of the Watcher House

scenes.text: A family's dream home turned into a nightmare with mysterious letters.
This eerie situation unfolded in Westfield, New Jersey.
In 2014, the Broaddus family received anonymous, threatening letters about their new home.
Investigation yielded no suspects; the identity of 'The Watcher' remains unknown.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Westfield, USA - 2014. The Broaddus family received anonymous letters from a mysterious figure known as 'The Watcher' after moving into their new home. Follow for daily cold cases!
